title: Orthopenthea schizodioides
taxonomy: Orthopenthea schizodioides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Orthopenthea, which is a group of flowering plants endemic to certain regions. The classification of Orthopenthea schizodioides is further detailed within the classification of Rubiaceae, a family of flowering plants. As of my knowledge, no higher-level classification for the plant is widely recognized. However, it is still considered a member of the clade Asterids, which encompasses numerous flowering plant families.
